items.title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
items.summary: 利用 AI 大模型一键生成高清短视频，支持多种视频风格和模板，降低视频制作门槛。
items.description: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

items.title: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
items.summary: 将任意代码转换为交互式知识图谱，支持搜索和提问，兼容 Claude Code、Copilot、Gemini 等 AI 工具。
items.description: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

items.title: Leonxlnx/taste-skill
items.summary: 为 AI 注入「品味」，防止生成无聊、千篇一律的内容，提升 AI 输出质量。
items.description: Taste-Skill - gives your AI good taste. stops the AI from generating boring, generic slop

items.title: colbymchenry/codegraph
items.summary: 预索引代码知识图谱，为 Claude Code、Gemini、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手减少 Token 消耗和工具调用次数。
items.description: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, OpenCode, AntiGravity, Kiro, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

items.title: affaan-m/ECC
items.summary: Agent 性能优化系统，提供技能、本能、记忆、安全等能力，支持 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等平台。
items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

items.title: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
items.summary: 从零开始学习 AI 工程实践，涵盖构建和部署 AI 应用的全流程教程与项目。
items.description: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

items.title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
items.summary: 754 个结构化网络安全技能，映射 MITRE ATT&CK 等 5 个框架，支持 Claude Code、Copilot 等 20+ 平台。
items.description: 754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

items.title: hardikpandya/stop-slop
items.summary: 帮助从文字中去除 AI 痕迹的技能文件，让 AI 生成的文本更自然、更像人类写作。
items.description: A skill file for removing AI tells from prose

items.title: chopratejas/headroom
items.summary: 在到达 LLM 之前压缩工具输出、日志和 RAG 块，减少 60-95% Token 消耗，保持回答质量不变。
items.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

items.title: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
items.summary: Anthropic 官方开源的知识工作者插件仓库，主要用于 Claude Cowork 环境中的知识处理工作流。
items.description: Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

items.title: EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
items.summary: 复合工程官方插件，用于增强 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等 AI 编程助手的工程能力。
items.description: Official Compound Engineering plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more

items.title: revfactory/harness
items.summary: 元技能系统，可设计领域特定的 Agent 团队，定义专用 Agent 并生成其使用的技能文件。
items.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.

items.title: supermemoryai/supermemory
items.summary: 极快且可扩展的记忆引擎，为 AI 时代提供高性能记忆 API 服务和应用。
items.description: Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.

items.title: p-e-w/heretic
items.summary: 针对语言模型的自动化审查去除工具，帮助恢复模型的自由表达和回答能力。

items.description: AI Agent Governance Toolkit — Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, execution sandboxing, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents. Covers 10/10 OWASP Agentic Top 10.

items.title: ogulcancelik/herdr
items.summary: 终端中的 Agent 多路复用器，支持在终端中同时管理和运行多个 AI Agent。
items.description: agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal.

items.title: modelscope/FunASR
